speaker: Priya Shah
text: Alex, I need you to help Nina Patel get set up with the demo workspace and make sure the OAuth callback issue is fixed before standup. Also prioritize the AskUserQuestions implementation for the action design chat agent because reviewers need to see the agent ask clarifying questions before taking action.

speaker: Priya Shah
text: Owen Brooks will handle requirements cleanup. Priya said the demo should focus on retrieval quality, cited answers, and showing exactly which source produced each claim.

speaker: Nina Patel
text: Nina Patel is blocked on setup because the Google Meet transcript import needs a stable JSON shape. We need a better graph trace so reviewers can see why Voltaire found each result.

speaker: Alex Rivera
text: The flight search should use the seeded fallback flight index as source of truth, use Exa only for optional web context, and never claim it booked anything.

speaker: Priya Shah
text: We need acceptance tests for the three primary demo queries, a fallback summary for broad questions, and clear separation between demo seed data and production user data.
